Project_name: Strengthen Arabic Language, National Identity and Values in Schools
Project_Description: System-wide initiative to strengthen Arabic language proficiency, embed national identity and values in school life, and support stronger student foundations across the education journey.
Emirate-wide programme to increase structured student participation in priority sports through league-format competitions and stronger sport pathways.

Project_name: Student Health, Nutrition and Physical Activities Program
Project_Description: Programme to strengthen student health, nutrition, and physical activity practices across schools and improve healthy lifestyle outcomes.
Reform programme to strengthen prevention, reporting, escalation, and school accountability for bullying incidents.
Targeted, data-driven programme to reduce chronic absenteeism through policy enforcement, parental engagement, and school-level interventions.

Project_name: Improve Screening and Access to Inclusive Education for Students of Determination
Project_Description: Programme to improve early identification, access, and support pathways for Students of Determination across the school system.
Programme to raise Grade 3 literacy outcomes through policy, screening, school interventions, and progress monitoring.
Programme to embed AI fluency, responsible use, and AI-enabled learning across schools. Focus for 2026 will be on AI fluency.
Programme to strengthen student competencies such as financial literacy, digital fluency, and critical thinking in pilot cohort schools.

Project_name: Alternative Pathways for Athletic, Artistic and Gifted Students
Project_Description: Structured pathways for talented students through mainstream schools, specialty tracks, magnet models, and development routes.

Project_name: Enhancing Relevance of Existing Higher Education Institution Programs
Project_Description: Programme to review HEI offerings for industry alignment and strengthen relevance to labour market needs.
Framework development initiative to strengthen governance and clarity for technical and vocational education and training.

Project_name: Teacher Quality Transformation from Selection to Performance
Project_Description: Teacher transformation programme covering proficiency standards, onboarding, profiling, training centres, apprenticeship hubs, and talent attraction and retention pathways.
Programme to expand the number of good quality, affordable schools and improve value for money for families through targeted market shaping.
Programme to attract leading school operators to Abu Dhabi and expand access to high-quality provision.
